entries.title: Amazon S3 Files
entries.summary: AWS launches NFS-mountable S3 buckets via an EFS sync layer — elegant 'stage and commit' architecture that eliminates file/object copy pipelines for AI agents and data science tools, but it's AWS-only and Abonmarche runs on Azure; watch for an Azure ADLS equivalent and apply the agent data-access design lesson to future cloud-resident workflows.

entries.title: Zapier SDK
entries.summary: TypeScript/Node.js SDK (open beta, free) giving agents and backends programmatic access to 9,000+ Zapier app integrations without OAuth management — compelling for multi-app AI agents, but Power Automate covers M365 natively and Zapier MCP already handles the Claude integration angle.

entries.title: ClickUp
entries.summary: All-in-one work management platform (tasks, docs, chat, dashboards, AI) with engineering firm templates — strong product, but redundant with Abonmarche's M365 stack and has no native Power Automate connector, making deep integration painful.

entries.title: Evidence — Business Intelligence as Code
entries.summary: Open-source, SQL + Markdown BI framework that connects natively to PostgreSQL — low-friction POC opportunity to build versioned, publication-quality cost estimating reports directly from CostEstDB without Power BI licensing.

entries.title: Claude Managed Agents
entries.summary: Anthropic's hosted agent infrastructure (public beta) — sandboxed execution, session checkpointing, MCP-native tool connections, and multi-hour runs — eliminates months of DevOps work and directly extends CostEstDB and plan-review workflows into production-grade agents.

entries.title: n8n — AI Workflow Automation Platform
entries.summary: Self-hostable, developer-first workflow automation platform with native MCP server/client support, 500+ integrations (PostgreSQL, SharePoint, Teams, ArcGIS), and AI agent nodes — a stronger alternative to Power Automate for engineering-grade AI pipelines; a prebuilt PostgreSQL MCP server template is directly relevant to CostEstDB.

entries.title: Make.com
entries.summary: Visual no-code workflow automation platform (formerly Integromat) with 3,000+ integrations, a native MCP Server that exposes scenarios as Claude/ChatGPT tools, and AI Agents in beta — compelling for CoP members who need cross-platform automation without code, but Power Automate and n8n cover Abonmarche's core use cases more effectively.
